channel.title: Current-Affairs on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in Current-Affairs on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: Strait to the Money
item.description: Dippy rides the Hormuz oil crisis to glory while Moony hedges with bottled water futures.

item.title: The Art of the Dump
item.description: Moony-Trump runs the worst hedge fund in history. Dippy exposes him on live TV.
